feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: connection ECC to s/4 hana
entry.content:
can  we get  integrated server example ECC to S/4 hana with idoc integrated to practise.

kindly mail the details if you have chmanikanta369@gmail.com

entry.title: Outbound IDOC Missing: Segment E1P1000 is missing in E1PLOGI for Basic type HRMD_A07?
entry.content:
Hello Dears,
Greetings!

I am working on outbound IDOC.

Basic type: HRMD_A07

Message type: HRMD_A

I am using the Tcode: PFAL to send the HR Master data from SAP using Outbound IDOC to the target system and it generates all segments without missing.

However, when we run the RBDMIDOC program it generates the Idoc segment E1P1001 only, the other segment is not generated for example employee master data (E1P0000, E1P0001, E1P0002, etc...), and E1P1000.

I have checked the IDOC, and the whole segment E1P1000 is missing/does not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI.

Why the segment E1P1000 and other segments missing/do not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Ibro Nur

entry.title: Re: Connectivity issue OAuth 2.0 between SAP CPI to Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Sapians,

I have identified that the error message "Invalid grant" may be caused by an error in the configuration or a mismatch of credentials or URL.

To resolve this issue, please take note of the following suggestions:

1. If you are connecting to a sandbox or non-production Salesforce instance, please use the URL "https://test.salesforce.com".For production, please use "https://login.salesforce.com".

2. Please ensure that no value is passed to the "Security Token Alias" field if there are no IP blockages from Salesforce's end.

I trust that these recommendations will help resolve the issue at hand. If you require any further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to me.

entry.title: CPI JSON Schema to be used for Message Mapping and Mapping Simulator
entry.content: Message Mapping in CPI now allows using a JSON schema file, but when I try to use the mapping simulator it fails with a collaboration error: Unused Resource: Source element content is not found. File 'schema-definition_ALL.xsd' not found.    Why is this occurring and how do I get the mapping simulator to work?

entry.title: Inbound proxy HTTP 500 Internal Server Error SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on HTTP(Axis) to Proxy(SOAP-XI) synchronous scenario in SAP PO 7.5 single stack.

Only some of the requests are getting back response messages and remainig are getting failed with following error like shown in screenshot below. But, we do not get error(but only delay in secs) while trying to send same failed request messages from SPROXY tcode of backend. But, issue is occuring in such a way only some of the synchronous requests are getting failed in SAP PO.

Could you please guide to resolve this issue and let us know how to find root cause of this issue.

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Hi, How can I attach Integration log file to my Email?
SAP CPI - How to create one summary log file and send it to business owner
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know how to approach following requirement.

Input csv file is read. Each record is validated and processed and written in one big output csv file (splitter/gather).

The validation result of each record needs to be written in one summary log file and mailed to the business owner.

How can I achieve this ? Thanks for any help or advice !

entry.title: SAP Process Orchestration 7.5 Single stack TLS 1.3 support
entry.content:
Hi, is this already supported for MQ Sender and MQ receiver? 

Any timeline for this?

entry.title: SAP PI/PO Send messages on a timed basis
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with an INVOICE. Our service provider receives a message with date and time, unfortunately, it now happens that we send multiple messages with the same naming, thus the messages cannot be transferred to the SFTP. Example: INVOICE_20240219-112933.xml The next message is again INVOICE_20240219-112933.xml.

Now my idea was to send the messages on a timed basis. Is there a way to set a timer so that the message is always sent after a new minute?

Thank you in advance

Best regards

entry.title: PI Communication Channel SFTP Sender Adapter does not pick up files
entry.content:
Hello,

I created an SFTP Sender in PI. It is able to connect to the other server and see that files exist in the folder, but they are not picked up. I'm able to use the key to connect to the server with SFTP, so I don't think it's a permission issue. What could be the problem, does anybody have any ideas?

As Filename I have [somefilename]*

entry.title: Deprecation of ADHOC report - Impact on Transfer of Applications from SF to SAP
entry.content:
Hello community, as you know SAP has announced the deprecation of AdHoc Report (Table Report) in 2H 2025. Nonetheless the standard solution to integrate SF and SAP for Recruiting regarding candidate data is relying on the usage of such an adhoc report! 

My question: what are SAP plans regarding the evolution of the integration solution? Any contact point/information at SAP would be appreciated 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SFIHCM/9c2f8380e6d14dd1adb43bfeebfcb2a1/281c5351400bec63e10000000a44176d.html?locale=en-US 

 

Thanks

Regards,

Olivier

entry.title: Connect S/4aha with Event Mesh Sap CPI
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to use the Event Mesh tool to trigger the event.
I would like the event mesh to be called when a material from MM01 is created on S/4hana, how do I connect the Event Mesh to sap?

entry.title: Token from REST response HTTP header SAP PI
entry.content:
SAP Process Integration 

I have a requirement on Proxy to REST service. The rest service is accessible after token is retrieved from another rest service.

Proxy - > REST TOKEN service (token returned as http header) -> REST Service (token passed as http header) - > Proxy

I am unable to use REST Look up as http header is not returned in Look up.. is there any other way to accomplish this?

Kindly share your thoughts.

entry.title: Content Modifier XPATH IDOC
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a IDoc XML being received through IDoc adapter and I tried to read the value of MESTYP using ContentModifier but the value is always coming as empty. I tried both header and property section like

MESTYP - //EDI_DC40/MESTYP (XPATH)

Any idea?

IDoc XML:

<FLOC01 xmlns="urn:sap-com:document:sap:idoc:soap:messages">
  <IDOC BEGIN="1">
    <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
      <TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
      <MANDT>XXX</MANDT>
      <DOCNUM>0000000000001278</DOCNUM>
      <DOCREL>XXX</DOCREL>
      <STATUS>XX</STATUS>
      <DIRECT>X</DIRECT>
      <OUTMOD>X</OUTMOD>
      <IDOCTYP>FLOCXX</IDOCTYP>
      <MESTYP>FLOCX</MESTYP>
      <STDMES>/EVISX</STDMES>
      <SNDPOR>SAPXXXX</SNDPOR>
      <SNDPRT>XX</SNDPRT>
      <SNDPRN>XXXXXXXXX</SNDPRN>
      <RCVPOR>XXXX_XXX</RCVPOR>
      <RCVPRT>XX</RCVPRT>
      <RCVPRN>XXXXXXXXX</RCVPRN>
      <CREDAT>YYYYMMDD</CREDAT>
      <CRETIM>HHMMSS</CRETIM>
      <ARCKEY>urn:sap.com:msgid=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</ARCKEY>
      <SERIAL>YYYYMMDDHHMMSS</SERIAL>
    </EDI_DC40>
    <FLOC_HDR SEGMENT="1">
      <ACTION>X</ACTION>
      <TPLNR>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLNR>
      <STRNO>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX.XX-XXX-XXX</STRNO>
      <TPLMA>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLMA>
      <TPLMA_L>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX</TPLMA_L>
      <PLTXT>ITEM DESCRIPTION</PLTXT>
      <EQART>XX-XXXX</EQART>
      <BUKRS>XXXX</BUKRS>
      <IWERK>XXXX</IWERK>
      <SWERK>XXXX</SWERK>
      <EQFNR>XX-XXX-XXX</EQFNR>
      <KOSTL>XXXXXXXXXX</KOSTL>
      <STORT>XX-XXX</STORT>
    </FLOC_HDR>
  </IDOC>
</FLOC01>

entry.title: PI - dynamic filename for SFTP to SFTP scenario using a UDF
Intrastat Intercompany Scenario SAP S4 Help Needed
entry.content: IF we are creating Sales order in Italy sales area and the intercompany plant is from Germany Sales Org .The intercompany document is created for company code for Swiss  . When we created provider information the below intercompany document is not showing when we run VE01 T-code . The Information provider creation which we are doing we have an option of company code and plant so in such situation how this can be created . Can i get some information or step by step guidance?

entry.title: Salesforce adapter (1.0.18) returns no result
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an Integration flow developed on CPI tenant (apache camel version 2.24) which connects to Salesforce application via Salesforce (version 1.0.18) sender adapter. Operation type is SOQL Execute query. When this integration flow is executed, it returns no query result as shown below:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<QueryResult>
<done>true</done>
<totalSize>0</totalSize>
</QueryResult>

I have the same integration flow developed on another CPI trail tenant (apache camel runtime version 3.14) with Salesforce adapter version 1.0.32. When this integration flow is executed, It is returning good number data records from the same salesforce instance (as above).

Can anyone clarify why there is a difference in the behavior and it is expected? 

Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Reprocessing Synchronous Messages in SAP PI/PO
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'm reaching out regarding a few use cases where I need to store and reprocess synchronous messages in SAP PI/PO. While I understand this might not be the ideal approach, I'd appreciate your guidance on alternative solutions achievable within SAP PI/PO.

entry.title: SOAP Axis Adapter - How To Activate Log Viewer Trace?
entry.content:
I am developing a SOAP to AXIS scenario in SAP PI.

The Axis receiver is configured with WSS4J for SOAP signature. I need to see the SOAP Envelope after the signature has been applied, but I am not able to do it.

I have tried with XPI Inspector, Wireshark adn TCPMon.

I have seen that is possible to get really cool debug information from the Axis and XML Security methods in the NWA Log Viewer as this blog screenshots shows: SOAP(axis) receiver scenario - signature verificat... - SAP Community

But when looking for those locations in the Log Configuration, none of them are available:


Is there anything I need to do to be able to collect those logs?

entry.title: Good afternoon community,Error in integration Inbound Delivery to TM
entry.content:
Good afternoon community,

I have the following problem, a scenario in TM embedded, I create the inbound delivery and the document does not raise the TM view. I check the integration log in the program /SCMTMS/CHK_DOC_INT_INT_TM_INTEGR, and the system indicates that the control key does not exist, but I check and yes this the delivery type, shipping point, shipping condition and other correct data. I attach screenshots.
